data.content: Shipped to main via merge commit 9c9340b340d6. Feature branch feat/foolery-c2ee-audit-ux merged cleanly into main (1 new commit on main since branch). All quality gates pass after merge: typecheck clean, 2237 tests passing (165 suites), 0 lint errors. Changes: removed tally summary card, added combined All Steps chart via buildCombinedSeries, improved date selectors with Last 24h preset button and range label, replaced agent table with per-step leaderboard showing best agent and margin to runner-up.
